title: Made to Stick: Why Some Ideas Survive and Others Die
author: Chip Heath
targetAudience: Business professionals, marketers, educators, and anyone interested in effective communication
relatedBooks: Made to Stick: Why Some Ideas Survive and Others Die
Contagious: How to Build Word of Mouth in the Digital Age
The Tipping Point: How Little Things Can Make a Big Difference
Switch: How to Change Things When Change Is Hard
keyInsights: Ideas that are simple, unexpected, concrete, credible, emotional, and stories stick better.
Effective communication can be learned and applied.
Understanding the psychology behind ideas can enhance their impact.
